FortuneSnakePayoutAndRulesShared.BodyFortuneSnakeFeature1: During any spin, the Fortune Snake Feature may be randomly triggered while the reels are spinning.
FortuneSnakePayoutAndRulesShared.BodyFortuneSnakeFeature2: During the Fortune Snake Feature, a symbol is randomly chosen. Reels 1 and 3 will contain only the randomly chosen symbols or blank spaces, while reel 2 will contain only the Wild symbols or blank spaces.
FortuneSnakePayoutAndRulesShared.BodyFortuneSnakeFeature3: After all reels stop spinning, if there are 1 or more additional symbols (either a randomly chosen symbol or a Wild symbol) appearing on the reels, all reels will respin again with the previously appeared symbols staying in their positions.
FortuneSnakePayoutAndRulesShared.BodyFortuneSnakeFeature4: After all reels stop spinning, if there are no more additional symbols (either a randomly chosen symbol or a Wild symbol) appearing on the reels, the Fortune Snake Feature ends and wins are paid.
FortuneSnakePayoutAndRulesShared.BodyBonusBet1: The Bonus Bet option can be activated for each spin which increases the bet by 1.5x.
FortuneSnakePayoutAndRulesShared.BodyBonusBet2: Activating the Bonus Bet will double the chance of entering the Fortune Snake Feature.
FortuneSnakePayoutAndRulesShared.BodyBonusBet3: Current Bet Size and Bet Level will not be affected by the Bonus Bet.
FortuneSnakePayoutAndRulesShared.BodyBonusBet4: The Bonus Bet option can be activated and deactivated during the main game.
FortuneSnakePayoutAndRulesShared.BodyTenTimesMultiplier1: When 4 Wild symbols appear in reel 2, the win will be multiplied by x10.
FortuneSnakePayoutAndRulesShared.BodyTenTimesMultiplier2: Stand a chance to win up to %{5000}x of the total bet amount.

FortuneSnakePayout.WildDescription: Wild symbol substitutes for all symbols.

FortuneSnakeRules.GeneralRules1: Fortune Snake is a 3-reel (3 rows in reels 1 and 3, and 4 rows in reel 2) video slot featuring respins and stacked Wild with x10 multiplier.

GeneralRules2.value: The game is played with 10 bet lines (fixed), bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
GeneralRules2.comment: %{minBetMtp}, %{maxBetMtp}, %{minChip}, %{maxChip} will be minimum bet level, maximum max level, minimum bet size and maximum bet size in numeric form.
GeneralRules2.example: The game is played with 10 bet lines (fixed), bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of 0.05 to 50.
